name: Cinnamon Kuchen
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the desired temperature.
2. In a bowl, mix beaten egg and milk until well combined.
3. Gradually add sugar and whisk until smooth.
4. Sift in flour and baking powder, stirring until no lumps remain.
5. Gently fold in sliced apples until evenly distributed.
6. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish, spreading it to an even layer.
7. Sprinkle topping over the filling.
8. Place the dish in the preheated oven.
9. Cook for the specified time or until golden brown.
10. Turn off the heat and remove from the oven when done.
